content: do we have support in-tree or in a patch series somewhere to export a symbol from a module for another module to use?

...if you mean exporting particular Rust items by tagging them in the source code. If you mean modules using other modules in general, my plan is to simply export all symbols like we do for e.g. core, at least initially.
I just created a small side C file for my module to export the one symbol I needed
